name: Raspberry Shortcakes with Two Sauces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a square pan, 9x9x2 inches or 8x8x2 inches.
3. In a large bowl, beat all ingredients except raspberries on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
4. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Pour batter into pan and bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool on a wire rack.
7. Prepare Hot Fudge sauce and Creamy Almond sauce as per their respective recipes.
8. Cut the cake into 9 squares and split each shortcake in half.
9. Fill each shortcake with Hot Fudge Sauce, Creamy Almond Sauce, and about 1/4 cup raspberries.
10. Top with additional Hot Fudge Sauce and garnish with remaining raspberries.
